name: Executive Dashboard Initiative Q2 2026
description: Strategic project to deliver executive reporting dashboard with real-time project visibility and milestone tracking for enterprise stakeholders.

milestones.name: Architecture & Design Review
milestones.description: Complete system architecture design, component specifications, and data model definition

milestones.name: Core UI Components
milestones.description: Build foundational Blazor components: dashboard layout, timeline, metrics display, work item tracking

milestones.name: Data Integration & Validation
milestones.description: Implement data.json loading, validation service, and caching layer

milestones.name: Performance Optimization
milestones.description: Optimize rendering for sub-1-second page loads and PowerPoint screenshot quality

milestones.name: Executive Testing & Feedback
milestones.description: Stakeholder acceptance testing and design refinement based on executive feedback

milestones.name: Production Deployment
milestones.description: Final deployment to production, documentation, and training materials

workItems.title: Dashboard layout CSS grid implementation
workItems.description: Responsive CSS grid layout for header, timeline, metrics, and work items sections

workItems.title: Milestone timeline SVG rendering
workItems.description: Horizontal timeline visualization with status color coding

workItems.title: Project metrics KPI cards
workItems.description: Display completion percentage, health status, velocity, and milestone counts

workItems.title: Work item status columns
workItems.description: Three-column layout for Shipped, In Progress, and Carried Over categories

workItems.title: Print-to-PDF optimization
workItems.description: CSS adjustments for clean PowerPoint screenshot output at multiple resolutions

workItems.title: Data.json schema documentation
workItems.description: Complete JSON Schema v7 specification with field constraints and validation rules

workItems.title: DataValidator service implementation
workItems.description: Implement validation service with error logging and startup checks

workItems.title: DI container registration
workItems.description: Register DataProvider and IDataCache services in Program.cs

workItems.title: Error handling overlay UI
workItems.description: Display user-friendly error messages for missing or invalid data.json

workItems.title: Performance profiling and benchmarking
workItems.description: Measure page load times and identify optimization opportunities

workItems.title: Chart.js library integration
workItems.description: Add Chart.js CDN reference for advanced timeline and metrics visualization

workItems.title: Real-time data refresh mechanism
workItems.description: Implement polling or event-based updates for live dashboard data

workItems.title: Accessibility compliance audit
workItems.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance review and remediation

workItems.title: Multi-language localization support
workItems.description: Resource files and localization infrastructure for international deployment

workItems.title: Integration testing suite
workItems.description: End-to-end tests for dashboard data loading and component rendering
